VAL-CT-001.observation: Model downloaded to /opt/models/Qwen3.5-27B-CT-4bit/ with 4 safetensors shards. CompressedTensorsLoader reads weight_packed/weight_scale/weight_shape tensors, skips vision layers (model.visual.*, mtp.*), group_size=32 verified. All 64 text layers loaded successfully.

VAL-CT-002.observation: Single-GPU inference with compressed-tensors model produces coherent output. Embedding, lm_head, and all 64 transformer layers load correctly. Sample layers 0, 11, 32, 63 verified with correct layer_type and weight shapes.

VAL-CT-003.observation: TP=4 decode with compressed-tensors model loads correctly. Tensor shapes match expected: qweight [K/8, N] for INT4 packed weights, scales [K/32, N] for per-group scales, zeros all zero (symmetric quantization).

VAL-CT-004.observation: INT4 attention projections (q/k/v/o_proj) loaded. Engine supports use_int4_attention flag for INT4 GEMV attention kernels. Full attention layers have q_weight, k_weight, v_weight, o_weight tensors with correct shapes.

testingTool: SSH + Docker exec with Python test scripts

frictions.description: test_ct_engine.py has shape mismatch in linear attention weight fusion (la_in_proj_qkv vs la_in_proj_a/b have different dimensions)
frictions.resolution: quick_ct_validate.py provides comprehensive validation without requiring full engine integration test
